hooks.command: /usr/bin/python3 -c 'import json,re,sys; payload=json.load(sys.stdin); msg=payload.get("last_assistant_message") or ""; markers=("Concept Summary","Creative Direction","Scene Timeline","Remotion Storyboard Script","HyperFrames Composition Plan","Markdown Storyboard"); looks_like_storyboard=any(marker in msg for marker in markers); fence_types=[match.group(1).lower() for match in re.finditer(r"^```([A-Za-z0-9_-]+)\s*$", msg, re.MULTILINE)]; valid_tail=len(fence_types) >= 1 and fence_types[-1] == "md"; response={"continue": True} if (not looks_like_storyboard or valid_tail) else {"decision": "block", "reason": "Storyboard responses must end with one standalone ```md``` Markdown Storyboard block."}; print(json.dumps(response))'
